svg.text: Leaderboard, Rank, Achievements, Stage Settlement, Gift Box

g.text: Functions outside playable stages: leaderboards, competitive rankings, achievements, stage settlements,
and Wonderland gift boxes. Access via [Manage Peripheral System] in the System menu.
Only Leaderboard OR Competitive Rank can be enabled at a time (mutually exclusive).

svg.text: Records in-game info visible from the lobby

g.text: Choose to enable either the Leaderboard or Competitive Rank Function
Allow leaderboard data when playing through room teams (not matchmaking)
A stage supports multiple leaderboard templates; specify template ID in data config
Each leaderboard only records information for the top 1,000 players
Customizable name to distinguish between different leaderboards
Identifier for this leaderboard, used when modifying data via node graph
Higher priority leaderboards are displayed closer to the top
Do Not Reset (persistent) / Reset With Season (data resets on new season)
Lower Values First / Higher Values First
Set Player Leaderboard Score as Float — compatible with floating point values
Set Player Leaderboard Score as Integer — compatible with integer values

svg.text: Player rank points with settlement states

g.text: Allow rank points adjustments in room teams
Detailed Rank Points Scoring Rules displayed in stage info interface
Customizable name to distinguish different score groups
Identifier for this score group, used in node graph operations
Rank points earned when player settles with victory state
Rank points earned when player settles with defeat state
Points for undefined state / escape state
Handle based on stage situation (teammates fleeing, disconnection, imbalance)
Additional score rewards based on percentage of victory points for consecutive wins
Prevent rank drops at tier boundaries (e.g., Silver to Bronze protection)
Switch the scoring group that affects player's competitive rank
Set Player Rank Score Change / Get Player Rank Score Change
Get Player Rank Info — retrieve current rank information for a player
Enable or disable the achievement system
Allow achievement progress in room teams (not matchmaking)
Progress carries over across multiple playthroughs — players can continuously accumulate to unlock achievements.
Name and image must be configured
Set Achievement Progress Tally — set absolute progress value
Change Achievement Progress Tally — increment/decrement progress | Query If Achievement Is Completed

svg.text: Triggered from Node Graph, ends the stage

g.text: Stage Settlement is an action triggered from the Node Graph. Once triggered, the entire stage ends.
The settlement result is passed to the Peripheral System to update Leaderboard and Rank data.
Settlement state is dynamically updated during gameplay; results are based on each player's current state.
When "False", player's settlement state is set to "Escape State"
Only meaningful when Escape Validity is "True". Three states:
Receives victory points from scoring template
Receives defeat score from scoring template
Default state; grants undecided score from scoring template
Faction Settlement (by faction) or Personal Settlement (individually)
Use Ranking Settings node to edit display order during settlement
Low to High (ascending) or High to Low (descending)
Settle Stage | Set Player Settlement Ranking Value | Set Faction Settlement Ranking Value
Set Player Settlement Success Status | Set Faction Settlement Success Status
System Menu (top-left) → [Manage Wonderland Gift Box] → Opens editing interface.
Each Stage can contain up to 20 Gift Boxes.
Unique identifier; must be unique. Save IDs must be subset of online version IDs
Choose from provided icons or upload a custom icon
Indicates the quality of this Gift Box
Leaderboard (choose leaderboard + rank) / Rank (ranking requirement) / Ultimate Achievement
When enabled, players can obtain again when Season updates
Disabled = permanent. Enabled = set number of Seasons it stays active
Higher values appear first in Shop
ON = listed permanently after initial Season
OFF = set effective Season via Listing Settings
Defines which Seasons the Gift Box is active in.
Choose a Season to edit listed Gift Boxes
Add Gift Boxes to be listed in selected Season
Click top-left corner or uncheck to remove
Permanent Gift Boxes cannot be removed in
Consume Gift Box — consume a gift box for a player
Query Corresponding Gift Box Quantity | Query Corresponding Gift Box Consumption Quantity
Leaderboard OR Rank (mutually exclusive) → Achievements (persistent progress) →
Stage Settlement (triggers results) → Wonderland Gift Box (rewards based on Leaderboard/Rank/Achievement)

a.text: Miliastra Academy Documentation: Wonderland Gift Box

svg.text: AI Generated, based on Craftspeople Academy. Version: Luna 7
